CustomField.description: Always true. Permanently indicates that nepa_risk_score__c is computed by NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer using PermitTEC v0.1 historical data. Required by Salesforce AI AUP: AI-generated scores must be disclosed as such. Field is formula-driven and cannot be overwritten.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This risk score is AI-computed from PermitTEC v0.1 historical litigation data. Treat as analytical guidance — not a legal determination.
CustomField.label: Risk Score is AI-Generated
